title: Oakland First Fridays
description: Monthly street festival on Telegraph Ave with local art, food, music, and culture. Free to attend.

title: 4th of July Parade & Celebration
description: Alameda's beloved 4th of July Parade — one of the largest and oldest in the Bay Area. Free and family-friendly.

title: Stern Grove Festival
address: 19th Ave & Sloat Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94132
description: Free outdoor concert series in a beautiful eucalyptus grove. World-class performers every Sunday.

title: Freight & Salvage — Old-Time Jam
description: Community old-time jam session at the legendary Freight & Salvage. All skill levels welcome.

title: El Rio Queer Latinx Dance Night
description: Vibrant queer Latinx dance party with live DJs and community vibes at El Rio.

title: Berkeley World Music Festival
description: A day of free world music performances featuring artists from Africa, Latin America, Asia, and beyond.

title: Alameda Summer Concert Series
description: Free outdoor concert at the Alameda Point Antiques Faire. Bring a blanket and enjoy live music by the bay.

title: Yoshis Jazz Showcase — Late Night
description: Late-night jazz showcase at Yoshi's — Oakland's premier jazz and blues destination.

title: The Chapel — Indie Spotlight
description: An indie music showcase at The Chapel featuring up-and-coming Bay Area artists.

title: Cornerstone Berkeley — Punk Night
description: High-energy punk night at Cornerstone Berkeley. Local bands and touring acts.

title: Rhythmix — Roots & Soul Evening
description: An intimate evening of roots and soul music at Rhythmix Cultural Works, Alameda's beloved community venue.

title: Fox Theater — Rock Revival
description: Rock revival night at the iconic Fox Theater in Oakland. Classic sounds, modern energy.

title: Bottom of the Hill — Local Bands Night
description: Local bands showcase at Bottom of the Hill — SF's beloved indie rock venue in Potrero Hill.

title: Berkeley Farmers Market Live Music
address: Center St & Martin Luther King Jr Way, Berkeley, CA 94704
description: Free live music at the Berkeley Farmers Market every Saturday morning. Local performers, fresh produce.
